productDisplayName: Baggit Women Border Cocoa Teal Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette with a three-fold open styleStitched detailing on the upper with a concealed magnetic closuresFive card holders, one id card holder, three insert pockets and one compartment with a zippered separator on the centre foldA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
